creator: kristinacors
caption: Editing My Hike In New Zealand Like A Survival Thriller #travelbucketlist #newzealand #newzealandhikes #mountcooknationalpark #editinglikearealityshow

transcription.text: The reaction rate and visibility is crazy. I hope it's not dangerous. Oh no. Stop. I actually don't want to be filming right now. I think we're actually lost. What was that noise? You know they have avalanches here, right? Oh my god!
